en.subject: Your permit {{referenceNumber}} has been issued
en.body: Dear {{applicantName}}, your permit {{referenceNumber}} is issued and effective from {{effectiveDate}}. The fee of {{feeAmount}} has been recorded.

es.subject: Su permiso {{referenceNumber}} ha sido emitido
es.body: Estimado/a {{applicantName}}, su permiso {{referenceNumber}} está emitido y vigente desde {{effectiveDate}}. Se ha registrado la tarifa de {{feeAmount}}.
